## [00:00 - 01:26]

Hi, this is Don Krause. Let's talk about the about you section on your webinar registration page. So frankly, I don't recommend including an about you section on your registration page. It probably won't increase conversion. The good that might come from it will be offset by the busy nature that it adds to the pace. I only recommend doing it if you have something very specific to this webinar in your background that should be brought up. Now, we will be telling them about you, but we'll be doing it after they register as part of the attendee promo sequence. If you do decide to include it, keep it short, only add elements that actually contribute to registration. So they don't care that you have a dog and three kids. Unless your webinar itself is about how to raise a family with three kids and a dog. So only add elements that actually are positively contributing to the message that you want to communicate in your webinar. And if you do it, make sure you add your picture in that because a picture can make a lot of difference of people trusting you in regards to your webinar.
